title: LPPrefix
description: Add luckperms chat prefix to player
body:
**WARNNING**: I will not take the initiative to update this mod.If you found some bugs,please create issues on github,I will fix them.
# Brief introduction
## What kind of mod is this?
This mod is used to add the prefix of the Luckperms permission group the player is in to the chat!
## How does it work?
Just use it with LuckPerms.
## Why are there no prefixes in chat?
The prefixes are added, but the mod itself does not modify the in-game chat.
## How to show prefixes
Configuration with other mods like [toNeko](https://modrinth.com/plugin/toneko)
